meaning: n.软块,多情,碎冰vt.压碎vi.控制器失灵,作长途旅行int.走!
examples: We have noticed a big difference between the forests of Chilga and what we have found so far at Mush.
What really takes me away from it all are the rocks and fossils exposed by and alongside the Mush River.
A handful of Africa's unique island mammal families that were present 26 million years ago are absent from sites younger than Mush.
Climbing into a small tin boat, my guide and I rolled out onto Mush Lake.
Softer fruits such as peaches and mangos need closer watching or they can turn to mush.
